content:
CONSEQUENTIAL AMENDMENTS

reference: s. 48
law: The Proceeds of Crime and Anti-Money Laundering Act (Cap. 59A)
provision: s.2
amendment: (1) By deleting the definition of "reporting institution" and substituting therefor the following definition— "reporting institution means a financial institution, designated non-financial business and profession or a virtual asset service provider"; (2) By inserting the following new definition in proper alphabetical sequence— "virtual asset service provider" has the meaning assigned to it under section 2 of the Virtual Asset Service Providers Act.
provision: s.44(4)
amendment: By deleting the words "financial institution" and substituting therefor the words "reporting institution".
provision: s.45A
amendment: (1) In subsection (1), by inserting the words "or virtual asset service providers" immediately after the words "legal arrangements"; (2) In subsection (3)(c), by inserting the words "or virtual asset service providers" immediately after the words "financial institutions"; (3) In subsection (3)(d), by inserting the words "or virtual asset service providers" immediately after the words "financial institutions" appearing after the words "offices of".
law: The Capital Markets Act (Cap. 485A)
provision: s.2
amendment: By inserting the following new definitions in proper alphabetical sequence— "Virtual asset service provider" has the meaning assigned to it under section 2 of the Virtual Asset Service Providers Act.
provision: s.11(3)
amendment: By inserting the following paragraph immediately after paragraph (fa)— (fb) regulate virtual asset service providers in accordance with the Virtual Asset Service Providers Act;
law: The Central Bank of Kenya Act (Cap. 491)
provision: s.2
amendment: By inserting the following new definition in proper alphabetical sequence— "virtual asset service provider" has the meaning assigned to it under section 2 of the Virtual Asset Service Providers Act;
provision: s.4A(1)
amendment: In subsection (1)— (a) by inserting the following new paragraph immediately after paragraph (db)— (dc) license and supervise virtual asset service providers; (b) on paragraph (h)— (i) on the opening sentence, by inserting the words "and section 6 of the Virtual Asset Service Providers Act" immediately after the expression "Cap. 59A"; and (ii) by inserting the following subparagraph after new immediately subparagraph (vii)— (viia) virtual asset service providers.
law: The National Payment System Act (Cap. 491A)
provision: s.2
amendment: By inserting the following new definition in proper alphabetical sequence— "reporting institution" has the meaning assigned to it under section 2 of the Proceeds of Crime and Anti-Money Laundering Act (Cap. 59A).
provision: s.17A
amendment: In subsection (1), by inserting the words "and section 6 of the Virtual Asset Service Providers Act" immediately after the expression "Cap. 59A" appearing in the first sentence.
